arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Brentford as Coady and Thomas among four changes in new formation
arts.sum: City (5-4-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Coady, Okoli, Thomas; Buonanotte, Ndidi, Soumare, Ayew; Vardy. It looks like it will be a 5-4-1 formation with Buonanotte on the right and Ayew on the left, with Wilfred Ndidi and Boubakary Soumare in the middle.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy names one Leicester star he 'can't wait' to manage, explains what Enzo Maresca told him
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy takes over from Steve Cooper...

arts.ttl: Leicester scouting in-demand 26-G/A star ahead of potential move
arts.sum: Leicester City have recently appointed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager and the former Manchester United striker will look to get their season back on track. After a disappointing start to the season, Steve Cooper was shown the door and the 48-year-old has been appointed as his replacement. arts.ttl: Suggestion Van Nistelrooy has taken Leicester job for sake of it – Just wanted in to Premier League
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy may have taken the Leicester City job just to get his foot into the Premier League door. That’s at least according to Valentijn Driessen, via Voetbal Primeur, who believes the Dutch coach faces a very difficult first experience as a manager in England’s top flight. arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy is NOT managing Leicester vs Brentford after Man Utd U-turn
arts.sum: New Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will be watching on as interim Ben Dawson takes charge against Brentford in the Premier League after agreeing to join the Foxes

arts.ttl: Basara Mainz: Why a former Leicester City star is running a Japanese club in the heart of Germany
arts.sum: In the summer of 2024, Shinji Okazaki retired from playing professional football, but stayed in the sport as head coach of German sixth division club Basara Mainz. There, the 38-year-old not only...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names the Leicester City player he 'cannot wait to work with'
arts.sum: In his first interview after being appointed, Van Nistelrooy expressed his excitement at taking over at the Foxes and hailed Vardy, who has four goals in 11 matches this season, as someone he "can't wait" to work with. Ruud van Nistelrooy has singled out Jamie Vardy as the one player that he is most looking forward to working with after he was appointed as the new Leicester City manager.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy named Leicester City manager
arts.sum: Leicester City appoint former Manchester United assistant coach Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager on a deal until June 2027.
